settings.text:
We are supremely confident in the transformative power of the Neoglyn Anti-Gravity device. That’s why we offer an industry-leading 60-Day Results Guarantee.

How it Works

If you have used your device as directed (5 minutes a day, 5 days a week) for a full 60 days and do not see a visible lifted, toned, and contoured difference in your facial appearance, you are eligible for a full refund.

Returns Process

  1. Contact our support team within 60 days of receiving your device to initiate a return.
  2. We will provide a prepaid return shipping label.
  3. Once we receive the device, your refund will be processed to the original method of payment within 5-7 business days.

Damaged or Defective Devices

Every Neoglyn device comes with a 1-year limited warranty. If your device arrives defective or develops a fault, please contact us immediately for a replacement.
